summary: A Go-based monolithic project leveraging an automated agent orchestration system (GOrchestra) to extensively test an MCP handler and assertion runner.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated extra test files scattered across agent directories
Potential test duplication between root and GOrchestra/glm-agents paths
Clean git status combined with recent session archives suggests heavy automated commit churn
suggestions: Consolidate or garbage-collect archived agent test directories to reduce repository bloat
Ensure root-level extra tests and agent-generated extra tests do not overlap in coverage
Monitor automated agent session commits to prevent excessive noise in the git history
